---
name: Documentation update
about: Suggest fixes, clarifications, or additions to omohi documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the documentation issue or improvement in one or two sentences.

## Current Documentation

Which page, section, command example, or file is affected?

## Suggested Update

Describe the change you want to see in the documentation.

## Why This Matters

Explain how this improves clarity, correctness, or usability for users or contributors.

## Additional Context

Add links, screenshots, examples, or related issues/PRs if useful.
